transition: 大過 Dà Guò (Great Exceeding) -> 剝 Bō (Splitting Apart)
verse_zh: 廓落失業，跨禍度福，利無所得。
verse_en: Vast and vacant, livelihood lost; straddling disaster, crossing toward fortune. Profit is nowhere to be found.
note: Loss and emptiness -> atmospheric-night scene, stipple render. Matrix-skin finish on the dark composition.
prompt: Inside a ruined gateway framing a vast empty courtyard, a single lantern gutters against the dark like a dying ember. Foreground: cracked flagstones and an overturned empty basket. Midground: a lone figure crosses a narrow plank between two pools of shadow. Far off, faint cold hills dissolve into black mist. One vermillion seal glows on a leaning post. Golden age science fiction stipple illustration, thousands of individual ink dots building luminous tonal gradients, figures emerging from darkness through pure pointillism technique, ethereal glowing quality, meticulous dot-work rendering every form, phosphor-green and amber palette on black.
